name: wnt7a_wnt7b_chr1_chr11
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: wnt7a/wnt7b — limb-fin patterning. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
